case_title: TURNER, DAVID VS SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CONTROLLER'S DEPT.

docket_entries.description: NOTE:FILING BY MAIL,ROUTED TO FANNIE,TO WINDOWS. NO DENIAL LETTER ATTACHED.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TURNER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CONTROLLER'S DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURNER, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CONTROLLER'S DEPT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
